summary: Subscription System Testing Complete - Backend 100% pass (15/15 tests), Frontend UI verified working. All subscription features implemented correctly with MOCK in-app purchases.
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription system is fully implemented and working with MOCK IAP
MOMs always get FREE access with subscription_status='free'
Doulas/Midwives can start 30-day free trial for monthly or annual plan
Plans & Pricing page accessible from profile via 'Upgrade to Pro' link
Trial status banner shows correctly with days remaining
Pro features list matches backend pricing API response
seed_data_creation: Test users created for subscription testing (prefixed with TEST_ in backend tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription system fully implemented with MOCK IAP. Backend tests cover: pricing API (public), status API (auth required), start trial (DOULA/MIDWIFE only), activate subscription (mock), cancel subscription. Frontend tests verified: profile page shows subscription card, navigation to /plans-pricing works, trial start button works, status updates correctly.

backend_apis.GET_subscription_pricing: PASS - Returns monthly $29, annual $276 with features
backend_apis.GET_subscription_status_mom: PASS - Returns 'free' status with full access
backend_apis.GET_subscription_status_doula_no_sub: PASS - Returns 'none' status, no pro access
backend_apis.GET_subscription_status_midwife_no_sub: PASS - Returns 'none' status, no pro access
backend_apis.trial_duplicate_prevention: PASS - Cannot start trial when active subscription exists
backend_apis.invalid_plan_type_rejection: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid plan types

frontend_ui.plans_pricing_page_loads: PASS - Shows MOMs free section and PRO plans
frontend_ui.doula_profile_subscription_card: PASS - Shows 'Upgrade to Pro' when no subscription
frontend_ui.midwife_profile_subscription_card: PASS - Shows 'Upgrade to Pro' when no subscription
frontend_ui.navigation_to_plans_pricing: PASS - Clicking 'Upgrade to Pro' navigates correctly
frontend_ui.trial_status_display: PASS - Shows 'Trial Active - X days remaining' after trial start
